strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably meets the 15-year floor
Founder of GISCollective (open source geo-data platform on Kubernetes) demonstrates entrepreneurial, builder-first instinct inside a product context
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, showing early engagement with agentic AI tooling
concerns: AI depth is shallow and recent: no ML/AI research background, no demonstrated AI products at scale — current work is developer tooling, not strategic AI platform leadership
Career ceiling is Staff/Senior Software Engineer; no evidence of director-level IC scope, executive advisory work, or influencing org-wide technical strategy
Education inconsistency: MIT BS CS (2009–2012) dates overlap with simultaneous employment in Cluj-Napoca, Reykjavík, and New York City, raising credibility concerns
response.justification: The role demands recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products or platforms, director-level IC influence, and strategic advisory capability for cloud and AI customers. Bogdan brings genuine technical breadth and a 20-year track record, but his AI engagement is limited to recent developer-tooling work (MCP code generators) rather than the foundational AI platform or ML product leadership the role centers on. He has never operated above Staff/Senior level, with no evidence of shaping engineering or product strategy across an organization. The entrepreneurial thread (GISCollective, startup stints) is a partial positive, but it does not offset the core competency gaps in AI depth and executive-level influence. Additionally, the MIT credential as listed contains chronological inconsistencies that warrant verification. Derived score reflects a technically capable candidate who is at least two career phases away from this role's requirements.
